object.property:
Hello normal line not in context.

This sentence contains an annotated part and is followed with random words that are not annotated.

This is another normal line not in context.

in th before annotated after in th

annotated in th

in td before annotated after in td

annotated in td

this should never be in selection context

this neither

Random sentence without annotation

Random title with annotated part and words after

This is a random sentence that should not be in context

Completely annotated title

  1. This item is not annotated

  2. This item is partly annotated and has words after

  3. This item is completely annotated

  4. This item is not annotated neither

This is a random sentence that should not be in context

This is an annotated citation

This is a random sentence that should not be in context

This is a partly annotated citation

This is a random sentence that should not be in context

This is a paragraph in a citation

This paragraph is annotated

This paragraph is not annotated

In this sentence, there are two annotations that are nested and some words after.
This annotates “This paragraph is annotated” in a citation
This annotates “This item is completely annotated”
there are two annotations that are nested
This annotates “annotated” in a td cell
This annotates “annotated part” in a h1
This annotates “Completely annotated title” in a h2
This annotates “there are two annotations that are nested”
This annotates “partly annotated” in a citation
This comment annotates “annotated part” in a paragraph at the beginning
This annotates “annotated” in a th cell
This annotates “This is an annotated citation”
This annotates “partly annotated” in a second item of an ordered list
